name: Automated Inventory Reorder & Vendor Notification Pipeline

parameters.content:
## Automated Inventory Reorder & Vendor Notification Pipeline
### How it works

1. The workflow pulls stock and vendor data from Google Sheets on a schedule.
2. It processes and merges this data, filtering for necessary reorders.
3. Reorder information is aggregated, updated in a Google Sheet, and pushed to Slack.
4. A secondary Slack-triggered flow handles customer queries by emailing internal users and updating a spreadsheet log.

### Setup steps

- - [ ] Configure Google Sheets credentials for all sheet nodes.
- - [ ] Set up a Slack bot token and connect it to the Slack trigger/notification nodes.
- - [ ] Link your Gmail account for the email notification node.
- - [ ] Map the specific sheet IDs and ranges for all Google Sheets integrations.

### Customization

Users can modify the reorder threshold logic in the merge nodes or adjust the Slack channel IDs for different notification routing.

## Initiate and fetch sheets

Trigger and data retrieval from Google Sheets.

## Format source data

Formatting data from product and vendor sheets.

## Merge and evaluate conditions

Merging and initial processing logic.

## Prepare data for aggregation

Standardizing and aggregating data for reorders.

## Fetch and process reorders

Fetching reorder sheet and processing updates.

## Update records and notify Slack

Writing reorder updates and notifying Slack.

## Slack message trigger flow

Slack event trigger and filtering.

## Email notification and status update

Fetching context and sending email notifications.
